---
title: "102-phylogeny.Rmd"
author: "joe sweeney"
date: "2026-03-10"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#install.packages('ape')
#install.packages('phangorn')
library(ape)
library(phangorn)
library(tanggle)
library(ggtree)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
align496<-read_csv("../outputs/100/align-496.csv", col_names = c("Ind","Reads","Dedup","Cov"))
filtered_align <- subset(align496, Dedup > 500000)
filtered_align <- subset(filtered_align, Cov > 0.1)
meta<-read_csv("metadata/meta01222025.csv")
m404 <-left_join(filtered_align,meta, by="Ind") %>%   mutate(Path=paste0("data/",Ind,".sort.flt.bam")) %>% mutate(Pop=`Tributary/Collection Location`)
m_nwrk <- subset(m404, Species == "newarkensis" )
```

Filter for samples out of LD
```{sh, eval=FALSE}
module load bcftools
bcftools +fill-tags outputs/101/renamed_nwrk.vcf.gz  -- -t MAF,F_MISSING | bcftools view -i 'F_MISSING < 0.05' | bcftools view -i 'INFO/MAF > 0.05' |  bcftools +prune -m 0.20 -w 50kb --nsites-per-win 1 --nsites-per-win-mode maxAF  > outputs/101/pruned_nwrk.vcf

bcftools +fill-tags outputs/101/renamed_nwrk.vcf.gz  -- -t MAF,F_MISSING | bcftools view -i 'F_MISSING < 0.05' | bcftools view -i 'INFO/MAF > 0.05' |  bcftools +prune -m 0.20 -w 50kb --nsites-per-win 1 --nsites-per-win-mode rand  > outputs/101/pruned_nwrk-rand.vcf
```


Convert VCF to PHYLIP
```{sh, eval=FALSE}
curl -LO https://raw.githubusercontent.com/edgardomortiz/vcf2phylip/master/vcf2phylip.py
module load conda
conda create -n py2 python=2.7 && conda activate py2
python vcf2phylip.py -i outputs/101/pruned_nwrk.vcf
python2 vcf2phylip.py -i outputs/101/pruned_nwrk.vcf
python2 vcf2phylip.py -i outputs/101/pruned_nwrk-rand.vcf
mkdir outputs/102
mv *.phy outputs/102
```


```{r}
dat<-read.dna(file="../outputs/102/pruned_nwrk.min4.phy")
write.nexus.data(dat, file="../outputs/102/pruned_nwrk.nex")

dat<-read.dna(file="../outputs/102/pruned_nwrk-rand.min4.phy")
write.nexus.data(dat, file="../outputs/102/pruned_nwrk-rand.nex")
```


Make network in SplitsTree4 with Taxa, splits, and network
```{r}
net<-read.nexus.networx("../outputs/102/pruned_nwrk.network")
g<-ggsplitnet(net)  
g$data<-left_join(g$data, m_nwrk, by=c("label"="GVL_Code")) 

n<-g + 
  geom_tippoint(aes(fill=`Tributary/Collection Location`), cex=5, pch=21, alpha=1.0) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option="H") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(pch = 22)))

n
```

```{r}
df<-relocate(m_nwrk, GVL_Code) %>% rename(label=GVL_Code)
t <- read.tree("../outputs/102/pruned_nwrk.tre")
ggtree(t) %<+% df +
  geom_tippoint(aes(color=`Tributary/Collection Location`)) +
  geom_tiplab(size = 1.5) +
  geom_treescale() 
```
